description_long: This bonsai features a compact, rounded canopy of lush green foliage, with leaves densely clustered on short, gnarled branches. The trunk is thick and textured, displaying a naturalistic, aged appearance with visible bends and subtle twists. The branches radiate outward in a balanced, layered fashion, creating a harmonious silhouette typical of traditional bonsai aesthetics. The foliage is vibrant and healthy, with a consistent green coloration and a full, bushy look. The pot is not visible in these views, but the tree itself is well-proportioned and appears meticulously pruned. This bonsai would make an elegant addition to a tabletop or garden setting, offering a miniature representation of a mature tree.
description: A lush, rounded bonsai with dense green foliage and a thick, textured trunk, featuring balanced, layered branches and a naturalistic, aged appearance.
description_view_0: From above, the bonsai displays a dense, circular canopy with foliage evenly distributed and branches radiating outward.
description_view_1: This view highlights the fullness of the foliage and the layered arrangement of branches, with the trunk partially visible beneath the leaves.
description_view_2: The bonsai appears slightly elongated from this angle, showing the depth of the canopy and the intricate branching structure.
description_view_3: A frontal perspective reveals the thick trunk, the main branching structure, and the overall balanced, rounded silhouette of the bonsai.
attribute_pot_type: The pot is not visible in the provided views, so its type, material, and style cannot be determined.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is thick and exhibits gentle, naturalistic bends and subtle twists, resembling the informal upright (Moyogi) bonsai style.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are densely arranged in a radial and layered pattern, extending outward from the trunk and forming a balanced, rounded canopy.
attribute_leaf_density: The foliage is dense and lush, with leaves closely packed throughout the canopy, giving a full and vibrant appearance.
